name: structured-debugging
description: Hypothesis-driven debugging methodology for hard bugs. Use this skill whenever you're investigating non-trivial bugs, unexpected behavior, flaky tests, or tracing issues through complex systems. Activate proactively when debugging requires more than a quick glance — especially when the first attempt at a fix didn't work, when behavior seems "impossible", or when you're tempted to blame an external system (model, API, library) without evidence.
author: QwenLM
